# 启动本地开发服务器

### User
gimme commands to start localhost

### Assistant
```bash
cd packages/dashboard && pnpm dev
```

This starts the Astro dev server for the dashboard. It'll give you a localhost URL \(usually `http://localhost:4321`\).
ENDOFFILE)
